title: Block RAM inference with negedge clock generates code that can't place

features.name: block ram with asymmetric clock edges
features.description: Code should include a dual-port RAM inference where write port uses posedge clock and read port uses negedge of the same clock signal

features.name: memory read on negative clock edge
features.description: Code should include a memory read operation inside an always block triggered by the negative edge of a clock
features.snippet: always @(negedge clka) begin doutb <= mem[addrb]; end
